# howwarimpactsyou.com

> Macro-to-consumer price impact simulator and flight fuel risk checker. Models how wars, oil shocks, and currency moves affect everyday goods across 68 countries. Includes a flight fuel alert tool showing how the Strait of Hormuz crisis affects aviation fuel, flight routes, and airline operations.

## Key facts
- 6 conflict scenarios: Hormuz 2026, Russia-Ukraine, Iran-Israel-US, Gaza/Red Sea, COVID-19, Iraq/Gulf
- 10 consumer categories: bread, dairy, eggs, rice, cooking oil, vegetables, meat, detergent, fuel, household basket
- 68 countries with impact rankings
- 26 country fuel vulnerability profiles (EIA, IEA sourced)
- 20 airline impact summaries
- 10 verified flight routes with pre/post prices
- Route risk checker with origin, destination, layover, time horizon (0-6 months), ceasefire scenario
- 128 unit tests, all calculations deterministic and documented
- v3.0 (April 2026)

## Pages

- [Home](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/): Overview with most-impacted countries and entry points
- [Regional Impact Simulator](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/simulator): War-by-war price impact dashboard
- [Country Impact Simulator](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/country-simulator): Country-specific impact detail with category toggles
- [Flight Fuel Alert](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/flight-alerts): Route risk checker, country fuel cards, airline impacts, 30-day news digest
- [How It Works](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/how-it-works): Methodology, formula, data sources, validation, learning articles
- [About](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/about): Mission, editorial standards, author, project timeline
- [Changelog](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/changelog): Full version history from v1.0 to v3.0
- [Press Kit](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/press): Key statistics, citation guidelines, media contact
- [Feedback](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/feedback): Submit corrections, data, or methodology feedback

## Scenario landing pages (60 total)
- [/impact/{war}/{category}](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/impact/hormuz-2026/fuel): One page per war-category combination
- Example: /impact/hormuz-2026/bread, /impact/ukraine-russia/fuel, /impact/covid/eggs
- Each page shows: top 5 and bottom 5 impacted countries, macro shocks, caveats

## Learning articles (5)
- [What is pass-through?](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/learn/what-is-pass-through)
- [How wars affect food prices](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/learn/how-wars-affect-food-prices)
- [Commodity price shocks explained](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/learn/commodity-price-shocks)
- [Currency depreciation and import costs](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/learn/currency-depreciation-imports)
- [Oil price transmission to consumers](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/learn/oil-price-transmission)

## API endpoints (JSON, CC BY 4.0)
- [GET /api/data/wars](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/api/data/wars): All war impact data
- [GET /api/data/rankings](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/api/data/rankings): Flattened impact rankings
- [GET /api/data/countries](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/api/data/countries): 68 countries with coverage status
- [GET /api/prices](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/api/prices): Live commodity prices (6 commodities)
- [GET /api/fuel-digest](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/api/fuel-digest): 30-day fuel news + EIA prices

## Text views (machine-readable markdown)
- [GET /impact/{war}/{category}/text](https://howwarimpactsyou.com/impact/hormuz-2026/fuel/text): Plain text scenario summary

## Data sources
- U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) — oil consumption, Brent + jet fuel prices (public domain)
- World Bank — fertilizer prices, Pink Sheet commodity data
- IMF — exchange rates, country economic indicators
- FAO — food price indices
- IEA — import dependency, country energy reviews
- JOGMEC — strategic reserve data (Japan)
- BP Statistical Review — refining capacity
- Zero Carbon Analytics — Hormuz exposure indices
- GDELT Project — news aggregation (public domain)
- IATA / airline press offices — flight route data
- SerpAPI / Google Finance — live commodity prices

## Impact model
EstimatedImpactCeiling = PassThrough x Sum(FactorChange x ExposureCoefficient x FXImportAdjustment x LagAdjustment)
- Pass-through: 100% (ceiling), 75%, 50%, 25%
- Lag: Immediate (1.0), 3 months (0.95), 6 months (0.88), 12 months (0.75)
- This is a scenario ceiling, not a forecast

## Fuel vulnerability scoring
VulnerabilityScore (0-100) = ReservePoints (35) + ImportPoints (25) + HormuzPoints (25) + RefiningPoints (15)
- Route risk: origin 50% + layover 30% + destination 20% (or 70/30 without layover)
- Return trip assumes 7-day stay with additional reserve depletion
- Ceasefire scenario reduces Hormuz exposure by normalcy percentage (0-100%)

## How to cite
howwarimpactsyou.com (2026). Macro-to-Consumer Price Impact Simulator, v3.0. https://howwarimpactsyou.com
